## What & why

Describe the change and the problem it solves. Link any related issue (`Closes #...`).

## Changes

-

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] For infra changes: `cdk synth` succeeds for affected stacks
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`, `README.md`) if behavior/interfaces changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups, out-of-scope items).
